selections.name: Let My People Go
selections.reason: Boasts a field-best 117 speed figure and drops slightly in class. The sharp cutback to a turf sprint suits his pressing style perfectly.

selections.name: Our Starry Night
selections.reason: Consistent turf sprinter with a 115 speed figure. Draws well inside and should get a ground-saving trip just off the pace.

selections.name: Murdock
selections.reason: Larry Rivelli trainee with solid form. The rail draw is advantageous on this tight turf course, allowing him to save ground.

selections.name: Eakly
selections.reason: Capable of popping a big figure on his best day. Will need some pace to run at but offers value in the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Mischievous Rogue
danger_horse.reason: Veteran with back class and a 116 speed figure. Can absolutely threaten if the pace melts down.

selections.name: Subliminal
selections.reason: Ran a strong 95 speed figure on debut. Experience is key in these 2yo maiden races, and she has a distinct advantage.

selections.name: Midnight Escapade
selections.reason: Asmussen first-time starter with sharp morning workouts. The rail draw is tricky but she has the pedigree to fire early.

selections.name: Shinobu
selections.reason: Joe Sharp and Irad Ortiz team up here. Must respect the connections in a wide-open maiden sprint.

selections.name: Mood Spin
selections.reason: Norm Casse trainee draws outside, keeping her clear of early trouble. Solid works suggest she is ready.

danger_horse.name: Forsaken Dreams
danger_horse.reason: First-timer for Beckman. Watch the tote board for late money as an indicator of readiness.

selections.name: Passionfruit
selections.reason: Holds a massive class edge with a 117 class rating and 108 speed figure. Should dominate this maiden field if she runs to her numbers.

selections.name: Sister Jean
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 103 speed figure. Draws well and will be pressing the pace throughout.

selections.name: Max
selections.reason: Has shown flashes of ability with a 105 speed figure. Fits well in this spot and offers exotic value.

selections.name: Mighty Nora
selections.reason: Draws wide but has the tactical speed to overcome it. A solid 101 speed figure puts her in the mix.

danger_horse.name: Muskoka Katt
danger_horse.reason: Has a 101 speed figure and draws inside. Can hit the board at a price.

selections.name: The Town
selections.reason: Drops into a claiming spot with a strong 109 speed figure. Irad Ortiz takes the mount, signaling serious intent.

selections.name: Kicking Clear
selections.reason: Solid closer with a 102 speed figure. Will benefit from the long Churchill stretch if the pace is honest.

selections.name: Todo Men
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 101 speed figure. Tactical speed should keep him out of trouble.

selections.name: Admiral Hall
selections.reason: Draws the rail and has a 101 speed figure. Can save ground and make a late run for a piece.

danger_horse.name: Gallic Charm
danger_horse.reason: First start since being reported as a gelding. Equipment change could spark massive improvement.

selections.name: Major Rager
selections.reason: Joe Sharp and Irad Ortiz are a lethal combination. First-time starter should be primed and ready.

selections.name: My Lucky Wife
selections.reason: Kenny McPeek trainee draws outside, which is fine for a 5F sprint. Expecting a solid debut.

selections.name: Side Quest
selections.reason: William Walden runner with Axel Concepcion aboard. Workouts suggest she has early foot.

selections.name: Kihei Kiana
selections.reason: Bret Calhoun and Brian Hernandez Jr. team up. A dangerous duo in these maiden sprints.

danger_horse.name: Bride
danger_horse.reason: Has one start under her belt (95 speed figure). Experience is a huge plus, though the rail is tough.

selections.name: Arabian Power
selections.reason: Owns a field-best 112 speed figure. Irad Ortiz rides for Brad Cox; this horse is strictly the one to beat.

selections.name: Timayyyy
selections.reason: Posted a 116 speed figure recently. If he replicates that effort, he will be right there at the wire.

selections.name: Master Sommelier
selections.reason: Consistent 108 speed figure. Tactical speed will keep him in the perfect striking position.

selections.name: Stakeholder
selections.reason: First start since being reported as a gelding. The ultimate equipment change could wake him up at a price.

danger_horse.name: Turbo Launch
danger_horse.reason: Draws the rail and has a 109 speed figure. Can save all the ground and sneak into the exotics.

selections.name: Moonlight Dash
selections.reason: In peak form with a 109 speed figure. The 7-furlong distance is perfect for her pressing style.

selections.name: French Blue
selections.reason: Bob Baffert trainee with Irad Ortiz. Classy filly (109 class rating) who will be very tough.

selections.name: Colonial Rose
selections.reason: Has a 103 speed figure and draws well. Will be closing late and can pick up the pieces.

selections.name: Golden Irish
selections.reason: Solid 101 speed figure. Has the tactical speed to sit a good trip just off the leaders.

danger_horse.name: Going Steady
danger_horse.reason: Consistent runner with a 99 speed figure. Can hit the board if the pace is hot.

selections.name: Snare
selections.reason: Boasts a field-high 113 speed figure. Drops into a claiming spot where he should be highly competitive.

selections.name: Warlander
selections.reason: Consistent performer with a 111 speed figure. Asmussen trainee will be closing hard down the long stretch.

selections.name: Mega Magic
selections.reason: Draws the rail and has a 107 speed figure. Luis Saez will have him saving ground for a late run.

selections.name: Quarry
selections.reason: Solid 101 speed figure. Tactical speed should keep him in the mix throughout.

danger_horse.name: Da Prince Is Right
danger_horse.reason: Has a 111 speed figure and can pop a big race on his best day. Do not ignore in exotics.

selections.name: Eclatant
selections.reason: Elite Grade 1 caliber filly with a 116 class rating. Brad Cox and Irad Ortiz make her the clear standout.

selections.name: Usha
selections.reason: Baffert trainee with a 117 class rating. Will be the main danger and should ensure a fast pace.

selections.name: Zeitlos
selections.reason: Has a 114 speed figure and is a very consistent stakes performer. Will be closing late.

selections.name: Lotsandlotsofcandy
selections.reason: Solid 112 speed figure. Can pick up the pieces if the top two duel each other into defeat.

danger_horse.name: Foie Gras
danger_horse.reason: Has a 108 speed figure and draws outside. Capable of hitting the board at a price.

selections.name: Diagram
selections.reason: Standout in a weak field with a 102 speed figure. Should be able to control the pace or sit just off it.

selections.name: Debby's Gal
selections.reason: Has a 103 speed figure and drops in class. A major threat if she runs to her back numbers.

selections.name: Lockdownyourtown
selections.reason: Solid 98 speed figure. Consistent runner who should be in the mix at the wire.

selections.name: She's Gotta Go
selections.reason: Asmussen trainee with a 92 speed figure. Can improve in this spot.

danger_horse.name: Nanzig
danger_horse.reason: Draws the rail and has a 95 speed figure. Can save ground and sneak into the superfecta.
